vulnerability.title: Implement STIG Sub Crypto Policy
vulnerability.description: Create a custom cryptographic policy to follow the guidance from DISA.
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: cat << 'EOF' > /etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules/STIG.pmod cipher@SSH=AES-256-GCM AES-256-CTR AES-128-GCM AES-128-CTR mac@SSH=HMAC-SHA2-512 HMAC-SHA2-256 EOF sudo update-crypto-policies --set FIPS:STIG

triage_decision.reason: The finding involves hardening SSH cryptographic settings per STIG guidelines, which is a standard auth/ssh change unlikely to cause lockout or system breakage. The remediation script directly modifies SSH ciphers and MACs in a controlled manner, following established hardening patterns.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; networking affected; filesystems affected; SSH connectivity; cryptographic policy change
